ingredients.name: Katase Bridge
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒251-0035 Kanagawa, Fujisawa, Katasekaigan, 2 Chome−16 Katase Bridge, 国道134号線
ingredients.entityContext: Sakuta crosses this bridge near Enoshima at the start of the movie, framing the coastal setting where his encounter with the young Shoko Makinohara begins. The bridge's view of the Enoshima causeway is faithfully recreated in the film.

ingredients.name: Hanamizuki
ingredients.entityContext: This small restaurant near Katase Bridge appears as a background location in scenes set around the Enoshima waterfront, grounding the film's coastal Fujisawa atmosphere.

ingredients.entityContext: This bridge in the Fujisawa area appears in the film as Sakuta travels through the neighborhood near his home, part of the pilgrimage route fans trace along the Katase River vicinity.
